markdownRemark.html:
As-salāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

Please see attached. This is to inform you that Dār As-Ṣaḥāba will be holding the ʿīdul-fiṭr Prayer.

If ʿīd is on….

Sunday, September 20th, then the prayer will be at Boys & Girls Club of Ottawa (2825 Dumaurier Ave. behind Muṣallá As-Ṣaḥāba)

If ʿīd is on….

Monday, September 21st, then the prayer will be at Michele Heights Community Centre (2955 Michele Drive, behind Tim Horton’s)

Time: For either place, the prayer will begin at…

1st Jamāʿah – 9:00am SHARP!!! 2nd Jamāʿah – 10:00am SHARP!!!

Please bring your own rugs, blankets, etc.

frontmatter.title: Explanation of Imām An-Nawawī's 40 Aḥadīth Lecture
